title: RP Vanilla Advanced
description: Built on Fabric and created for RP servers on Plasmo Voice (Nvidia fps boost)
body:
# RP Vanilla Advanced
Minecraft modpack focusing on performance for vanilla multiplayer using modern resourcepacks

Built on Fabric and created for RP servers on Plasmo Voice

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![RP server with this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bef3fa5ffa4118b344edd99cb0929b115f92c5f.png)

</details>


The Fabric modpack introduces a multitude of enhancements for this version, including new mods and resource packs that significantly improve the gameplay experience. Players can look forward to:

- **New Mods**: A curated selection of innovative mods that extend the game's functionality, offering new mechanics, items, and features that enrich the Minecraft universe.
- **Resource Packs**: Freshly designed resource packs that bring a new visual and auditory dimension to the game, with updated textures and sounds that create a more immersive environment.
- **Performance Improvements**: Optimizations that enhance the game's performance, ensuring smoother gameplay even with multiple mods installed.
- **Compatibility**: Careful consideration has been given to ensure compatibility between mods, providing a stable and cohesive modding experience.

This modpack is designed to elevate your Minecraft experience by seamlessly integrating new content while maintaining the core essence of the game. Enjoy the creativity and diversity that Fabric brings to your world!
